title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 217.675 - Handbook of rules governing conduct of parolees furnished to whom, duties of board
text:
217.675.  Handbook of rules governing conduct of parolees furnished to whom, duties of board. — The members of the board shall prepare and cause to be published a handbook containing all rules, regulations, and suggestions governing the conduct of parolees.  Handbooks shall be furnished to all parolees and to any employer of a parolee who requests it.  The handbook shall be continuously revised and updated by the board.
(L. 1982 H.B. 1196 § 120)
